userVisibleProblem: Overview, Gaming, and Diagnostics appeared as empty 0-row sidebar categories, sidebar rows exposed technical row counts, and there was no friendly first page for normal settings navigation.

dashboardBehavior.cardNavigation: Dashboard cards include Open buttons that select the matching sidebar category when that category is present.

shownWhen: duplicate/conflicting current config rows are present
copy: Some settings appear more than once in your config.

technicalDetailsBehavior: Technical export diagnostics remain available on normal settings pages through the collapsed diagnostics expander, but are not shown on Dashboard.
proofStillMissing: Pixel-level screenshot verification was not added; manual verification is listed below.
manualVerificationSteps: Confirm Dashboard is the first sidebar item and Overview, Gaming, and Diagnostics are absent.
Confirm sidebar labels do not show row counts.
Confirm Dashboard shows cards and not the settings list or details pane.
Click Appearance, then Appearance Blur Enabled, and confirm the polished details pane still appears.
Search for cursor.default_monitor and confirm its high-risk/oracle details still appear.
Confirm diagnostics are still available on normal settings pages but do not dominate Dashboard.
nextRecommendedSprint: Manual visual smoke pass for Dashboard card spacing and optional card navigation polish, without changing the write model.
